---
title: "Stplanr: A Package for Transport Planning"
description: "Robin Lovelace and Richard Ellison (2018). Stplanr: A Package for Transport Planning. *The R Journal*. https://doi.org/10.32614/RJ-2018-053"
date: "2018-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_stplanr_2018"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "The R Journal"
doi: "10.32614/RJ-2018-053"
publication-url: "https://doi.org/10.32614/RJ-2018-053"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Richard Ellison"
abstract: "stplanr - R package providing functions and data access for transport research"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** The R Journal
**Year:** 2018

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.32614/RJ-2018-053) [URL](https://doi.org/10.32614/RJ-2018-053) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

stplanr - R package providing functions and data access for transport research

## Citation

Robin Lovelace and Richard Ellison (2018). Stplanr: A Package for Transport Planning. *The R Journal*. https://doi.org/10.32614/RJ-2018-053

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_stplanr_2018,
	title = {stplanr: {A} {Package} for {Transport} {Planning}},
	volume = {10},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {https://doi.org/10.32614/RJ-2018-053},
	doi = {10.32614/RJ-2018-053},
	abstract = {stplanr - R package providing functions and data access for transport research},
	number = {2},
	urldate = {2016-11-24},
	journal = {The R Journal},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin and Ellison, Richard},
	year = {2018},
	pages = {7--23},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
